info.title: MoltSets API
info.description: Identity resolution API. Resolve emails, LinkedIn profiles, IP addresses, and hashed emails into enriched contact and company data.

bearerAuth.description: Pass your API key as a Bearer token. Keys follow the format `ms_XXXXXXXXXXX`.

tokens_charged.description: Credits consumed by this request. Always `0` when no data is returned.

message.example: The server cannot process the request due to a client error (400 Bad Request).
Message describing the nature of the invalid input.
No match was found for the data provided.
Rate limit exceeded. Maximum 100 requests per second.

post.description: Search for companies by name, domain, industry, size, or revenue. Use `query` for free-text company name search, `domain` for exact company lookups, and the categorical filters (industry, employee_range, revenue_range) to narrow results. Combine `query` with filters for best precision. Returns ranked results; higher `_score` = stronger match.

query.description: Full-text search across company name only. Do not put domain, industry, employee size, or revenue here — use the dedicated filter params for those.

domain.description: Exact domain filter. Omit the protocol (no https://). Prefer this over `query` when you have a known domain — it's a precise match.

industry.description: Exact industry filter. Map the request to one of the supported values.

employee_range.description: Exact employee count range filter. Prefer the numeric ranges when a size is given.

offset.description: Number of results to skip for pagination. Use with limit to page through results.

post.description: Search for people / business profiles by company, industry, size, or revenue. Use `query` for free-text company name search, `domain` for exact company lookups, and the categorical filters (industry, employee_range, revenue_range) to narrow results. Returns ranked contact records; higher `_score` = stronger match.

query.description: Full-text search across company name only. Do not put domain, industry, employee size, or revenue here — use the dedicated filter params for those.

domain.description: Exact domain filter. Omit the protocol (no https://). Prefer this over `query` when you have a known domain — it's a precise match.

industry.description: Exact industry filter. Map the request to one of the supported values.

employee_range.description: Exact employee count range filter. Prefer the numeric ranges when a size is given.

offset.description: Number of results to skip for pagination. Use with limit to page through results.

post.description: Find the best available email for a LinkedIn profile. Returns a business email when available, falls back to personal email. The `type` field indicates which was returned. Credits only charged when data is found.

linkedin_url.description: Full LinkedIn profile URL or slug.

email.description: Email address found, or null if not found.

type.description: Whether the returned email is a business or personal address.

last_validated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of last validation, or null.

post.description: Find the verified business email address for a LinkedIn profile. Returns business emails only — use enrich_email for a hybrid tool that falls back to personal email. Credits only charged when data is found.

linkedin_url.description: Full LinkedIn profile URL or slug.

post.description: Find the verified personal email address for a LinkedIn profile. Credits only charged when data is found.

linkedin_url.description: Full LinkedIn profile URL or slug.

post.description: Look up the highest-confidence personal email address for a LinkedIn profile using additional scoring across candidates.
Resolve a hashed email (MD5) to the plaintext email address and SHA-256 hash.

Find the verified mobile phone number for a LinkedIn profile. Only mobile numbers returned — no landlines. Credits only charged when data is found. Pass either `linkedin_url` (single) or `linkedin_urls` (batch, up to 100), not both.

linkedin_urls.description: Batch of LinkedIn profile URLs, up to 100.

post.description: Resolve a plaintext email or MD5 hashed email to a LinkedIn profile slug. Pass either `email` or `md5`, not both.
Resolve a plaintext email or MD5 hashed email to the highest-confidence LinkedIn profile URL when multiple candidates exist. Pass either `email` or `md5`, not both.
Look up a full business profile by LinkedIn URL, including name, title, company, firmographic data, and optionally mobile phone.

include_mobile_phone.description: When true, attempts to include mobile phone in the response. Costs additional credits when data is found.

post.description: Resolve a plaintext email or MD5 hashed email to a full business profile including name, company, title, and contact info. Pass either `email` or `md5`, not both.

include_mobile_phone.description: When true, attempts to include mobile phone. Costs additional credits when data is found.

post.description: Convert a business email address or hashed email (HEM) into SHA-256 personal hashed emails for identity resolution and audience matching. Pass either `email` or `md5`, not both.

md5.description: MD5 hash of the business email address.

post.description: Look up all known hashed email addresses (MD5 and SHA-256) for a LinkedIn profile, across both business and personal emails.
Resolve a plaintext email or MD5 hashed email to mobile advertising IDs (MAIDs). Pass either `email` or `md5`, not both.
Resolve an IP address (with optional user agent) to hashed email addresses (MD5), ranked by confidence score. Passing `user_agent` significantly improves match accuracy.

user_agent.description: Browser user agent string. Significantly improves match accuracy.

include_sha256.description: When true, includes SHA-256 hashes alongside MD5 hashes in results.

post.description: Resolve an IP address to mobile advertising IDs (MAIDs) associated with it.
Resolve an IP address to the company or companies associated with it. Best suited for B2B use cases — consumer ISP IPs will typically not resolve to a company.
Get your account details including name, plan, status, credit balance, and API key count. Free — does not consume credits.

schema.description: No arguments required. Send an empty object.

unlimited.description: true if the account has unlimited credits

api_key_count.description: Number of API keys on the account

user_count.description: Number of users on the account

post.description: Get your account's billing details including current plan, subscription status, credit balance, renewal date, and credit costs per tool. Free — does not consume credits.

schema.description: No arguments required. Send an empty object.

token_costs.description: Credit cost per tool call. Keys are tool names, values are integer credit costs.

post.description: Get your account's credit usage for a given time period. Free — does not consume credits.

period.description: Time window to report on. Defaults to `today`.

tags.name: Search
tags.description: Search and filter company and business profiles by name, domain, industry, size, or revenue.

tags.name: Get Verified Emails
tags.description: Resolve and enrich verified business and personal email addresses.

tags.name: Get Full Business Profile
tags.description: Resolve identifiers to full business profiles and company firmographics.

tags.name: Get Ad Audience
tags.description: Resolve identifiers to hashed emails (HEMs) and mobile advertising IDs (MAIDs) for audience matching.

tags.name: Get Company
tags.description: Resolve IP addresses to company data.

tags.name: Account
tags.description: Account management tools. Free — do not consume credits.
